sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15606" key="*)artepi/boulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀρτεπίβουλος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n15606.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Bread-thief,</tr_> name of a mouse in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:261" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">261</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
